retry_reason: Function returns NULL when device not found; device may appear later so caller may retry.
contract_summary: Get-wrapper: searches the sas_device_list and sas_device_init_list for a _sas_device with the given handle. If found, increments the device's reference count via sas_device_get and returns the pointer to the caller. The caller must check the return value (NULL if not found) and must call sas_device_put to release the reference when done with the device. The lock &ioc->sas_device_lock must already be held by the caller. This function does not transfer ownership of the lock; it only uses the lock to safely traverse the lists and acquire the reference.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to look up a _sas_device by handle, acquire a reference via sas_device_get, and return it to the caller; the list traversal is minimal lookup logic.
